visual: Stands feet shoulder-width, arms rise slowly to shoulder height then press down to waist — the opening posture of the form.
motion_description: The practitioner stands in a shoulder-width stance with knees slightly bent and weight evenly distributed on both legs. Both arms slowly rise forward to shoulder height, wrists slightly flexed so the hands lead, palms facing down. The arms then smoothly press back down toward the waist, palms remaining downward, as the knees bend slightly deeper. The motion maintains a slow, continuous flow with no torso rotation or weight shifting.
